title: lathyrus japonicus var. acutifolius
intro: Lathyrus japonicus var. acutifolius, also known as the Japanese peashrub, is a type of flowering plant in the pea family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of isoleucine, an essential amino acid. The medicinal properties of Lathyrus japonicus var. acutifolius may provide various health benefits, including relief from respiratory issues and inflammation, as well as support for the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that may be consumed to harness its potential benefits.
